top_signals.title: Auto Industry Fears USMCA Shakeup
top_signals.summary: Wall Street Host David Westin breaks down why the auto industry may want Washington to leave USMCA mostly intact. While Trump is focused on trade deficits and tougher rules, automakers are more worried about uncertainty, long-term investment and China’s growing role in North American supply chains. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tallest Building in Beijing Damaged After Apparent Small Airplane Crash
top_signals.summary: Images and video appearing to show a small aircraft crashing into Beijing’s CITIC tower spread across Chinese social media on Friday. Bloomberg could not independently verify the images or circumstances of the incident at the city’s tallest building. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New York Mets Fire Manager Mendoza After Rough First Half
top_signals.summary:
The last-place New York Mets fired manager Carlos Mendoza and replaced him with Andy Green, an executive in the team’s front office, for the remainder of the season. 
Randall Williams, Bloomberg Business of Sports Reporter, discusses the move from the Mets as well as the World Cup so far. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dimon upends succession race at JPMorgan again
top_signals.summary: Longtime lieutenant Marianne Lake recently informed she was no longer a CEO contender as new top deputies are named

top_signals.title: ON Semi tanks 20% following Synaptics deal as CEO defends core business
top_signals.summary: The pivot into physical AI grows On Semi's addressable market by an additional $30 billion, the company said.

top_signals.title: Chinese carmakers ‘knocking at US gate’ from Mexico and Canada
top_signals.summary: Beijing-subsidised vehicles emerge as flashpoint in North American trade relationship

top_signals.title: Micron sinks, continuing a whipsaw week of trading
top_signals.summary: Micron Technology's shares tumbled on Friday amid a global sell-off in technology stocks.

top_signals.title: Commission approves State aid for Romania's investment and development bank
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 26 Jun 2026 The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, Romanian measures for the national investment and development bank Banca de Investiții și Dezvoltare S.A. (‘BID').
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission opens investigation into possible anticompetitive conduct by Sanofi regarding the promotion of a flu vaccine for vulnerable patients
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 26 Jun 2026 The European Commission has opened a formal antitrust investigation to assess whether Sanofi has breached EU competition rules by carrying out a communication campaign that disparages the only rival flu vaccine recommended for vulnerable patients with risk factors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: First Majestic wins permits for Santa Elena expansion
top_signals.summary: The permits allow the company to begin underground development in the second half of 2026.
